chapters.title: The Two Banks
chapters.subtitle: An alternate history of Concord, New Hampshire.
chapters.body: Interstate 93 cuts north-south through Concord, separating West (downtown, State House, hospital, prisons) from East (airport, NH National Guard, State Office Park, the Heights). In an alternate-history civil war the highway becomes the front line - both sides fight to seize and hold the exits and interchanges along it.
